name: Mia and me – Magic Friends
short_description: Welcome to Centopia! Take your unicorn for a ride through enchanting tracks. Discover the Rainbow Island, Crystal Cave, Heart Valley, Blackwood Forest, and many more magical locations.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Centopia!

Take your unicorn for a ride through enchanting tracks. Discover the Rainbow Island, Crystal Cave, Heart Valley, Blackwood Forest, and many more magical locations. Help Mia, Yuko and Mo protect Centopia - take on exciting quests, search for magical items, and then, with the help of Phuddle, banish Gargona and the other villains! And then there's the cute little ponycorns you're sure to fall in love with too!

  • Choose your favourite unicorn from the many on offer

  • Collect unicorn dust and make Centopia bloom

  • Use magic to strengthen the unicorns in the Birth Grotto and maintain their magical glow

  • Preserve your memories in a great album

supported_languages:
English*, French, German*, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Polish
*languages with full audio support
